title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NCC Urban

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NCC Urban
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!
